title: Totem Plus
description: Small Totem Pop is a lightweight client side Fabric mod that makes the vanilla Totem of Undying pop animation smaller
body:
# Totem Plus

Totem Plus is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod by **EFLGANG** with ***Clevora Studios*** that lets you customize the vanilla Totem of Undying pop animation and held Totem appearance.

It keeps the normal Totem behavior, but gives you control over how large, flashy, loud, positioned, and animated it should be.

## Features

- Resize the vanilla Totem pop animation from 10% to 100%
- Customize held Totem size in the main hand and offhand
- Choose between preset held Totem sizes or a custom size
- Toggle the mod on or off
- Toggle Totem rotation on or off
- Toggle the fly-in animation on or off
- Adjust green/yellow Totem particle amount from 0% to 100%
- Optionally remove the green/yellow Totem particle effect completely
- Adjust Totem pop sound volume
- Customize the Totem pop position
- Choose between preset Totem pop positions or a custom X/Y position
- Customize Totem pop duration
- Show or hide the Totem pop message
- Customize the Totem pop message text
- Customize the Totem pop message color
- Client-side only

## Settings

All settings are available through Mod Menu.

You can adjust:
- Mod enabled/disabled
- Totem pop size
- Held Totem size
- Custom held Totem size
- Totem rotation
- Fly-in animation
- Totem particle amount
- Green/yellow particle removal
- Totem sound volume
- Totem pop position
- Custom Totem pop X/Y position
- Totem pop duration
- Totem pop message visibility
- Totem pop message text
- Totem pop message color

## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21.x
- Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
- Java 21+
- Mod Menu supported
- Client-side only
- Please know that there might be Bugs / Crashes at versions that are under 1.21.11
